LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE DISPOSAL & RECYCLING COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS ESTABLISHED AN ENTITLEMENT TO AN AWARD OF FEES AGAINST PLAINTIFF, BUT HAS NOT PRESENTED SUFFICIENT INFORMATION FOR THE COURT TO DETERMINE THE REASONABLENESS OF THE AMOUNT REQUESTED. THE COURT ORDERED MR. ROGERS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: ATTY. RICHARD M. ROGERS, TEL. 981-9788, FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEPHEN J. HIRSCHFELD OF CURIALE DELLAVERSON HIRSCHFELD & KRAEMR LLP, TEL. 835-9011, FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY GOLDEN GATE DISPOSAL & RECYCLING COMPANY.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE DISPOSAL & RECYCLING COMPANY'S Motion For Attorneys Fees IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY BECAUSE THE EVIDENCE SHOWS PLAINTIFF SERVED NOTICE OF DISMISSAL BY MAIL ON JAN. 10, 2008 AND DEFENDANT'S EVIDENCE IS INSUFFICIENT TO REBUT THE PRESUMPTION OF RECEIPT CREATED BY THAT SERVICE. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/PM)

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
STEPHEN J. HIRSCHFELD, ESQ.(CURIALE DELLAVERSON HIRSCHFELD & KRAEMER, LLP), (415)835-9000 FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY GOLDEN GATE DISPOSAL & RECYCLING COMPANY
RICHARD M. ROGERS, ESQ., (415)981-9788, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, BARBARA THOMAS

BEFORE THE ARGUMENT, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT DEFENDANT NORCAL WASTE SYSTEMS, DBA GOLDEN DISPOSAL & RECYLING COMPANY BEING AS A FORMER CLIENT. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE DISPOSAL & RECYCLING COMPANY'S MOTION For Attorneys' Fees IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS ESTABLISHED AN ENTITLEMENT TO AN AWARD OF FEES AGAINST PLAINTIFF, BUT HAS NOT PRESENTED SUFFICIENT INFORMATION FOR THE COURT TO DETERMINE THE REASONABLENESS OF THE AMOUNT REQUESTED. THE COURT ORDERED MR. ROGERS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/PM)
